title: Exline's More Carpets
body:
# Exline's More Carpets

This mod adds more carpets!

- Glass carpets made from glass blocks.
 
- Tinted glass carpets and stained glass carpets available as well.
  
- Cobblestone, stone, and smooth stone carpets.
  
- Craft cobblestone carpets from cobblestone, then place in furnace to get stone carpets.
  
- Place stone carpets in furnace to get smooth stone carpets.
  
- Dirt carpets too!
